was the [56th](/wiki/List_of_AHL_seasons "List of AHL seasons") season of the [American Hockey League](/wiki/American_Hockey_League "American Hockey League"). The league realigns from divisions into three divisions, creating the new Atlantic division. Fifteen teams played 80 games each in the schedule. The [Fredericton Canadiens](/wiki/Fredericton_Canadiens "Fredericton Canadiens") finished first overall in the regular season. The [Adirondack Red Wings](/wiki/Adirondack_Red_Wings "Adirondack Red Wings") won their fourth [Calder Cup](/wiki/Calder_Cup "Calder Cup") championship.

first_paragraph: The **1991–92 AHL [season](/wiki/Season_(sports) "Season (sports)")** was the [56th](/wiki/List_of_AHL_seasons "List of AHL seasons") season of the [American Hockey League](/wiki/American_Hockey_League "American Hockey League"). The league realigns from divisions into three divisions, creating the new Atlantic division. Fifteen teams played 80 games each in the schedule. The [Fredericton Canadiens](/wiki/Fredericton_Canadiens "Fredericton Canadiens") finished first overall in the regular season. The [Adirondack Red Wings](/wiki/Adirondack_Red_Wings "Adirondack Red Wings") won their fourth [Calder Cup](/wiki/Calder_Cup "Calder Cup") championship.

The **1991–92 AHL [season](/wiki/Season_(sports) "Season (sports)")** was the [56th](/wiki/List_of_AHL_seasons "List of AHL seasons") season of the [American Hockey League](/wiki/American_Hockey_League "American Hockey League"). The league realigns from divisions into three divisions, creating the new Atlantic division. Fifteen teams played 80 games each in the schedule. The [Fredericton Canadiens](/wiki/Fredericton_Canadiens "Fredericton Canadiens") finished first overall in the regular season. The [Adirondack Red Wings](/wiki/Adirondack_Red_Wings "Adirondack Red Wings") won their fourth [Calder Cup](/wiki/Calder_Cup "Calder Cup") championship.

## Team changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1991%E2%80%9392_AHL_season&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Team changes")]

* The [Newmarket Saints](/wiki/Newmarket_Saints "Newmarket Saints") move to [St. John's, Newfoundland](/wiki/St._John%27s,_Newfoundland_and_Labrador "St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador"), becoming the [St. John's Maple Leafs](/wiki/St._John%27s_Maple_Leafs "St. John's Maple Leafs"), playing in the Atlantic Division.
* The [Fredericton Canadiens](/wiki/Fredericton_Canadiens "Fredericton Canadiens"), [Cape Breton Oilers](/wiki/Cape_Breton_Oilers "Cape Breton Oilers"), [Moncton Hawks](/wiki/Moncton_Hawks "Moncton Hawks") and [Halifax Citadels](/wiki/Halifax_Citadels "Halifax Citadels") all shift from the North Division to the Atlantic Division.
* The [Adirondack Red Wings](/wiki/Adirondack_Red_Wings "Adirondack Red Wings") and [Capital District Islanders](/wiki/Capital_District_Islanders "Capital District Islanders") shift from the South Division to the North.
